mnemonics.title: DWH vs DL
mnemonics.content: Warehouse: Structured (SQL), Lake: Raw (Any Format), Lakehouse: Best of Both (ACID + Flexibility)

acronyms.usage: Critical for transactional integrity in lakehouses

visualTips.visualization: Warehouse: Filter at entrance gate | Lake: Sort through pile later

analogies.analogy: Like a library with raw books (lake) + catalog system (warehouse) for quick retrieval
